title: Palm Springs, November 2023
description: An interior sequence from Palm Springs, centered on museum rooms and installation details under warm modernist light.

cover.alt: Wide gallery room with framed works, a central column, and a lone visitor beneath a gridded wood ceiling.

items.alt: Illuminated geometric sphere sculpture glowing in a dark gallery.
Gallery wall labeled 'Kali Artographer 1932–2019' with a portrait and a blurred visitor beyond the doorway.
Large spider sculpture silhouetted against a bright curved skylight inside the museum.
Starburst chandelier suspended in a circular alcove with ribbed walls.
Scattered red rose petals on dim concrete steps.
